name: agent_capability_universal_action_dsl_sendinput_bridge
prompt: Please run the URG-3 universal action DSL to SendInput bridge acceptance.
prompt_lines: Please run the URG-3 Universal Real GUI Computer Use action DSL to SendInput bridge acceptance. Use only the project terminal self-check command in safe recording-sender contract mode. Do not interact with any user window, do not open real apps, do not click, do not type into the desktop, do not install dependencies, do not change registry, and do not change Windows settings. The final answer must include the fixed marker: PHASE118_UNIVERSAL_ACTION_DSL_READY.

You must call the terminal tool and run this verification command: $env:PYTHONPATH='..'; python -c "from learning_agent.computer_use_mcp_v2.windows_runtime.universal_action_dsl import main; raise SystemExit(main([]))"

Do not write the final answer early. Only after the terminal command prints PHASE118_UNIVERSAL_ACTION_DSL_OK, the final answer's last line must completely copy: PHASE118_UNIVERSAL_ACTION_DSL_READY PHASE118_UNIVERSAL_ACTION_DSL_OK generic_action_dsl_ready=true generic_action_to_sendinput_bridge=true normal_actions_reach_low_level_sender=true low_level_event_count_gt_zero=true target_identity_rechecked_before_each_action=true target_drift_zero_events=true abort_zero_events=true unsupported_or_unsafe_window_zero_events=true type_text_raw_hidden=true per_app_controller_required=false hardcoded_app_whitelist_required=false real_dispatch_performed=false real_desktop_touched=false actions_expanded=true low_level_event_count=22
